description: You are the billing administrator at a hospital using OpenClinic GA (http://localhost:10088/openclinic). A new insurance partner has just contracted with your hospital. Register it as a new insurer in the system with official name 'MediShield Pan-Africa Ltd' and language set to English. Patient Carlos Mendoza (already registered, ID 10002) has presented his insurance card. Assign this insurer to Carlos with policy number 'MSPA-2026-4471'. Note: Carlos has a prior uninsured consultation charge already on file that predates his insurance and must remain billed to the patient, not the insurer. Carlos is here today for a specialist consultation. Create a service with code 'SPEC01', description 'Specialist Consultation', price 45.00. Record today's consultation charge against Carlos, and generate an insurer invoice addressed to the new insurer that covers this new charge only. Login: username '4', password 'openclinic'.
